item.title: 🐾 𝐌𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐩𝐞𝐨𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐧𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐭… 𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐦. 🌱 The 𝐍𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐓𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐂𝐚𝐭 — also called the oncilla — is one of the smallest and most elusive wild cats in the Americas. Hidden in misty cloud forests high in the mountains, t

item.title: There’s a side to cats we never knew. It’s a common belief that cats can’t be trained, but that simply isn’t true. People just have to try, most never do. A cat can do anything a small dog can, yet they still aren’t federally recognized. For many people w
